summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fairway Golf app's three new features: multi-round tournament support, tournament registration/enrollment, and player profile pages. Backend APIs working excellently (28/29 tests passed). Frontend has new UI elements but some navigation issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: participant_count field returns 0 for all tournaments instead of actual count
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Tournament list shows 0 participants even when players are registered
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use GET /api/tournaments/{id}/participants to get actual participant list

ui_bugs.issue: Session management issues causing redirects to landing page during testing

integration_issues.issue: Some navigation flows redirect unexpectedly to landing page

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in browser console

passed_tests: Player profile with stats and history via GET /api/players/{user_id}/profile
Admin panel shows num_rounds field in create dialog
Tournament creation dialog has multi-round support
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix participant_count calculation in tournament list endpoint - currently returns 0 instead of actual registered player count. Address frontend session management issues causing navigation redirects.
